text.title: Multi Product Portfolio Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Multi Product Portfolio Management. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: tag-mode-per-product
step.action: Assign one of {build, grow, maintain, sunset} per product.

step.name: allocate-time
step.action: Set time_budget_hours per product respecting per-mode caps.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
